name: rhetoric-engine
description: Biolytics Rhetoric Engine: a staged presentation cognition pipeline for turning user intent, insight, argument, evidence, and delivery constraints into effective slide decks.

interface.shortDescription: Biolytics' staged cognition pipeline for user-led presentation creation
interface.longDescription: Use Biolytics Rhetoric Engine to guide agents through intent framing, insight externalization, argument construction, slide thesis mapping, cognitive design, visual reasoning, evidence curation, content distillation, deck compilation, critique, and delivery coaching.
defaultPrompt: Help me turn this rough presentation idea into a clear deck.
Help me build a presentation that communicates my view, not a generic AI summary.
